feed.title: Sic, The weblog of Ali Mohamed Ali

entry.title: I added numbering per tag
entry.summary: In continuation of the previous article, I have made numbering articles per tag.

entry.title: Completely automatic
entry.summary: I just changed up the site so that the export script pushes directly to the site. Automatically.

entry.title: New tag indexing features with more shell scripts
entry.summary: Explaining some new features in the time of writing, such as tag indexing, and how I programmed it in.

entry.title: Hello world! [sic]
entry.summary: The first post of a blog is the most difficult to write. Sic. This is a disorganized essay about the nature of writing, and where the blog lies in the middle.
